step.title: Scaffold Skill
step.goal: Create the skill directory and empty file shells under .vera/skills/{skill_id}/. The scaffold script does the file operations; this step orchestrates input gathering and confirmation. If the project does not have shared/workflow-engine.md and the new skill is type=workflow, copy the bundled reference from references/shared-fragments/workflow-engine.md to the project's .vera/shared/ location before scaffolding.

check.action:
Check if .vera/shared/workflow-engine.md exists in the project. If missing, copy from the bundled reference:
mkdir -p .vera/shared cp {skill-creator-path}/references/shared-fragments/workflow-engine.md .vera/shared/workflow-engine.md
If the file already exists at the destination, DO NOT overwrite. The user's project file is authoritative.
Workflow skills include shared/workflow-engine.md in their skill.yaml. Without it in the project's shared/, the build will fail.

substep.title: Confirm Skill Identifier

check.ask: What should the skill ID be? (lowercase kebab-case, e.g., "code-grill", "validate-yaml")

substep.action: Validate skill_id format: lowercase, hyphens, no underscores or spaces
Validate skill_id does not already exist at .vera/skills/{skill_id}/

substep.title: Run Scaffold Script
substep.note:
The scaffold script creates:
Workflow skill: .vera/skills/{{skill_id}}/ skill.yaml (empty) head.md (empty) skill-overview.md (empty) references/steps/ (empty directory) references/scripts/ (empty directory)
Exec skill: .vera/skills/{{skill_id}}/ skill.yaml head.md skill-overview.md references/scripts/
Data skill (flat layout): .vera/skills/{{skill_id}}/ skill.yaml SKILL.md

substep.title: Confirm Scaffold
substep.template-output:
Present the created skeleton: - .vera/skills/{{skill_id}}/skill.yaml (empty — filled in Step 5) - .vera/skills/{{skill_id}}/head.md (empty — filled in Step 4) - .vera/skills/{{skill_id}}/skill-overview.md (empty — filled in Step 7 for workflow) - References directories created based on type
If shared/workflow-engine.md was copied from the bundle, mention it.
[a] Adjust [c] Continue [y] YOLO

rules.rule: For workflow/exec: start with action verb (create-, validate-, extract-)
Must be unique across all skills in dubstack (check .vera/skills/ tree)
Files exist before filling sections — each step saves incrementally
If session crashes mid-creation, work is preserved on disk
Validation can run against partial files during development
